use_cases: Hero section headlines with animated shimmer effect on hover
Interactive text elements that respond to user hover states
Brand names or logos with premium gradient shimmer animation
Call-to-action buttons with dynamic hover feedback
Landing page text that creates visual interest without complex interactions
ai_summary: A lightweight text component featuring a smooth shimmer animation that sweeps across text on hover. The effect uses CSS keyframe animations with gradient overlays and mix-blend-mode for a polished, premium feel. Includes dark mode support and supports custom text content with automatic shimmer application.
